name: Accessibility
title: NDH Accessibility
description: This extension enables NDH to communicate accessibility accommodations for practitioners and locations in a consistent, computable form, using a coded value with extensible binding to AccessibilityVS for interoperable discovery and filtering; it is used in Location and Practitioner.

element.definition: This extension enables NDH to communicate accessibility accommodations for practitioners and locations in a consistent, computable form, using a coded value with extensible binding to AccessibilityVS for interoperable discovery and filtering; it is used in Location and Practitioner.
